tspan.tspan: Hello friends and future friends,
After >20 years of research, I think I have recently solved the AGI
problem, via the invention of a "Differentiable Logic Transformer" that
enables a neural-symbolic hybrid AGI architecture.
The source code is available on GitHub, under Creative-Commons license
and with plenty of documentation:
http://github.com/Cybernetic1/AGI-experiments
but the project may be difficult for beginners to navigate.
On March 14th (Saturday) I will host a webinar to explain my AGI
theory and experimental results. All are free to ask questions and
challenge my claims.
But the hardest part is that I plan to establish a global, decentralized,
democratic, open and transparent DAO organization to serve humanity
to transition through the Singularity. Many people are uncomfortable
with accepting democracy, truth, and transparency in the business
domain, but we should be aware that what we're facing is nothing short
of a metamorphosis of homo sapiens into a post-human future, where
capitalism itself may disintegrate. This is the second topic of our
webinar. All are welcome, and welcome to the Singularity,
Please join our Discord group for further notice:
http://discord.gg/TppJETPw3
YKY
